menu_options.monitoring: Other indicator (sensor only — telemetry to the Grosfarm cloud)
menu_options.cloud: Gros.farm cloud connection (links this HAOS to a cloud account)

heating.title: Temperature indicator
heating.description: Pick the area and the temperature sensor. Adding a heater relay turns this into a closed-loop control zone; leave it blank for telemetry only. Per-phase setpoints are pushed down by the Grosfarm cloud — at install we seed home = 22°C so the zone is usable right away.

data.name: Indicator name
data.heater: Heater relay (optional — leave blank for sensor-only)

humidifying.title: Humidity indicator
humidifying.description: Pick the area and the humidity sensor. Adding a humidifier/dehumidifier turns this into a closed-loop control zone; leave it blank for telemetry only. Target humidity is pushed down by the Grosfarm cloud; at install we seed 60%.

data.name: Indicator name
data.humidifier: Humidifier or dehumidifier (optional — leave blank for sensor-only)
data.humidifier_device_class: Device kind (only matters if the device above is picked)

lighting.title: Lighting
lighting.description: Pick the area, a light sensor (PPFD/lux/DLI), the kind of the sensor reading, and (optional) the grow-lamp relay. Local DLI controller integrates readings, decides when to switch the lamp based on the mode + target_dli pushed by the cloud.

data.name: Indicator name
data.light: Lamp relay (optional — leave blank for sensor-only)

lighting_lamp_type.title: Lamp type
lighting_lamp_type.description: Used to convert lux readings into PPFD (µmol/m²/s).

monitoring.title: Other indicator
monitoring.description: Pick the area and any sensor (CO2, soil moisture, EC, pH, light, ...). The reading is forwarded to the Grosfarm cloud — no local control loop.

cloud.title: Gros.farm cloud connection
cloud.description: Links this HAOS to a Gros.farm cloud account. Setpoints for the indicators you've added are pushed in over a long-lived WebSocket; sensor readings are streamed back as telemetry. For a local mock running on a dev machine the URL is usually `http://DEV-MACHINE-LAN-IP:8765`.

abort.already_configured: This sensor (and actuator, if any) is already wired to a Grosfarm indicator, or this cloud account is already linked.

error.heater_already_used: This relay is already controlled by another Grosfarm indicator.
error.humidifier_already_used: This humidifier is already controlled by another Grosfarm indicator.
error.light_already_used: This lamp relay is already controlled by another Grosfarm indicator.
error.invalid_auth: Cloud rejected the login / password / api_key.

presets.title: Per-phase temperatures
presets.description: Leave a field blank to keep its current value or to leave the phase unconfigured. Changes are pushed to the underlying thermostat immediately.

humidity.title: Target humidity
humidity.description: The single setpoint the humidifier (or dehumidifier) tries to keep. The cloud pushes the right value per growth phase once linking is set up.

sensor_only.title: Sensor-only indicator
sensor_only.description: Nothing to configure locally — the cloud receives readings from the sensor wired at install.
